_meta.source: Derived from NOAA NCEI 1991–2020 county climate normals (jan_low_f)
_meta.methodology: AAEMT ≈ jan_avg_low_f − 26.0°F; then mapped to USDA PHZ half-zone grid
_meta.notes: Approximate USDA Plant Hardiness Zone (decimal: 6.5 = Zone 6b). Offset 26.0°F calibrated for the continental US; typically within ±1 half-zone. For official zones see planthardiness.ars.usda.gov.
